name: nersc
description: NERSC Perlmutter tools: SLURM job submission with guardrails, queue intelligence, storage and postmortem analysis

nersc_python.title: Python interpreter
nersc_python.description: Absolute path to the Python (>=3.10) used to build the plugin venv. Leave empty to use python3 from PATH (module load python first on Perlmutter).

nersc_data_dir.title: Install/data directory
nersc_data_dir.description: Override where the plugin virtualenv and server data live. Leave empty to use the default plugin data directory.
